name: envprobe
purpose: One-call environment snapshot: OS, runtime versions, lockfile hashes, env-var names only (values never appear); diff detects drift.
reach_for_me_when: you are about to assume a toolchain or runtime version instead of checking it
behavior differs between machines or sessions and you suspect environment drift
you need to orient on a project's environment at session start

commands.name: snapshot
commands.summary: Capture the environment and save it as the baseline

commands.name: diff
commands.summary: Report drift versus the saved baseline (exit 4 if none)
